hooks.command: if [[ '$TOOL_INPUT_path' == *.py ]]; then uv run ruff check --fix '$TOOL_INPUT_path' 2>/dev/null || true; fi

hooks.prompt: Review claude-progress.txt. Has the agent completed all tasks for the current phase and verified all acceptance criteria? Treat [x] as verified and [~] as accepted-pending-live-deployment (not a gap). Only answer NO if there are unchecked [ ] items representing incomplete code work. Answer only: YES or NO followed by one sentence.
